commitResults.messageTitle: Fix filter state inconsistency across commands
commitResults.messageBody:
Reset filtered person list to show all persons after executing
add, delete, mark, unmark, tag add, tag delete, and clear commands,
matching the existing behavior of the edit command.

commitResults.messageTitle: Allow apostrophes, hyphens, and periods in names
commitResults.messageBody:
Update Name validation regex to accept characters like O'Brien,
Mary-Jane, and Dr. Smith while still requiring words to start
with a letter.

commitResults.messageTitle: Remove redundant filter reset from AddCommand
commitResults.messageBody:
ModelManager.addPerson() already resets the filtered list internally,
so the explicit call in AddCommand was a double update.

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix comment to clarify symbol restriction applies to spaces and slashes only

commitResults.messageBody:
- Fix JavaFx to JavaFX in DG (#272)
- Fix MacOS to macOS in DG (#273)
- Fix shutdown to shut down in DG heading (#278)
- Add case-insensitive note for Day in UG (#294)
- Remove stray blank block in UG edit section (#298)
- Fix Primary 3 to Primary3 in tag find example (#308)
- Fix mark/unmark expected output to include indices (#283, #284)
- Document help/exit ignoring extra text (#289, #290)
- Update Name constraints to mention / in UG (#270)

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix more documentation bugs from PE-D and address review feedback
commitResults.messageBody:
- Remove PlantUML tutorial link from DG (#293)
- Add find user story to DG (#303)
- Remove unused glossary term, add Parsing and Subcommand to DG (#310, #317)
- Add JavaFX, JDK, PATH to UG glossary (#313)
- Document single-lesson limitation in UG add command (#285)
- Document mark/unmark all-or-nothing batch behavior (#288)
- Document tag case-insensitive behavior (#291)
- Fix Name constraint wording to use English alphabets
- Fix mark/unmark expected output indices to match example commands

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix use case MSS and remove UI details from DG
commitResults.messageBody:
- Fix tag add use case to match actual behavior: ignore existing tags (#304)
- Fix tag delete use case to match actual behavior: ignore missing tags (#297)
- Replace UI-specific language in all use cases with abstract phrasing (#306)
- Fix Name constraint wording and mark/unmark output indices per review

commitResults.messageTitle: Address review feedback on tag delete use case and list command

commitResults.messageBody: Allow apostrophes, hyphens, and periods in names
Fix filter state inconsistency across commands

commitResults.messageTitle: Reject command if there are unknown prefixes
Merge branch 'prefix-tag-fix' of github.com:yytelliot/tp into prefix-tag-fix
